IRouteVerbPermissionProvider Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IRouteVerbPermissionProvider type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
GetPermission
Returns the permission for the specified verb.
Register
Register a new permission for the specified verb. If a permissions was previously registered for the same verb, all permissions are required to be met.
